## Before You Submit

Please confirm you are on the latest version before filing, to avoid duplicate reports of already-fixed issues.

## Version Check

- [ ] I am on the latest commit. Fork users should sync their fork first, then re-run Actions.
- Commit hash:
  - Local: `git rev-parse --short HEAD`
  - GitHub Actions: commit hash shown at the top of the workflow log
